questions.subject: Physics
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: A rectangular loop has a sliding connector $P Q$ of length $\ell$ and resistance $R \Omega$ and it is moving with a speed $v$ as shown. The set-up is placed in a uniform magnetic field going into the plane of the paper. The three currents $\mathrm{I}_1, \mathrm{I}_2$ and I are
options: $I_1=I_2=\frac{B \ell v}{3 R}, I=\frac{2 B \ell v}{3 R}$
questions.solution:
A moving conductor is equivalent to a battery of emf $=\mathrm{vB} \ell$ (motion emf) Equivalent circuit $I=I_1+I_2$
Applying Kirchoff's law $\begin{aligned} & \mathrm{I}_1 \mathrm{R}+\mathrm{IR}-\mathrm{vB} \ell=0 \ldots(1)\\ & \mathrm{I}_2 \mathrm{R}+\mathrm{IR}-\mathrm{vB} \ell=0\ldots(2)\end{aligned}$ Adding (1) and (2) $\begin{aligned} & 2 \mathrm{IR}+\mathrm{IR}=2 \mathrm{vB} \ell \\ & \mathrm{I}=\frac{2 \mathrm{vB} \ell}{3 \mathrm{R}} ; \quad \mathrm{I}_1=\mathrm{I}_2=\frac{\mathrm{vB} \ell}{3 \mathrm{R}}\end{aligned}$
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
